audit_items.proof_trace: All four dynamic allocations (res via kzalloc, dev_mutex and res->mutex via nfp_cpp_mutex_alloc) are freed on every execution path: err_free in nfp_resource_acquire frees dev_mutex and res; err_res_mutex_free in nfp_resource_try_acquire frees res->mutex before returning -EBUSY, so res->mutex is always already freed when err_free is reached; nfp_resource_table_init's dev_mutex is always freed via the err_unlock label; nfp_resource_release correctly frees res->mutex and res on the success path.
